members.name: _GetCaption
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to override the text caption for this animation node.

members.name: _GetChildByName
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to return a child animation node by its [param name].

members.name: _GetChildNodes
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to return all child animation nodes in order as a [code]name: node[/code] dictionary.

members.name: _GetParameterDefaultValue
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to return the default value of a [param parameter]. Parameters are custom local memory used for your animation nodes, given a resource can be reused in multiple trees.

members.name: _GetParameterList
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to return a list of the properties on this animation node. Parameters are custom local memory used for your animation nodes, given a resource can be reused in multiple trees. Format is similar to [method Object.get_property_list].

members.name: _HasFilter
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to return whether the blend tree editor should display filter editing on this animation node.

members.name: _IsParameterReadOnly
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to return whether the [param parameter] is read-only. Parameters are custom local memory used for your animation nodes, given a resource can be reused in multiple trees.

members.name: _Process
members.signature: public float _Process(float time, bool seek, bool isExternalSeeking, bool testOnly)
members.summary: When inheriting from [AnimationRootNode], implement this virtual method to run some code when this animation node is processed. The [param time] parameter is a relative delta, unless [param seek] is [code]true[/code], in which case it is absolute. Here, call the [method blend_input], [method blend_node] or [method blend_animation] functions. You can also use [method get_parameter] and [method set_parameter] to modify local memory. This function should return the delta.

members.name: AddInput
members.summary: Adds an input to the animation node. This is only useful for animation nodes created for use in an [AnimationNodeBlendTree]. If the addition fails, returns [code]false[/code].

members.name: BlendAnimation
members.signature: public void BlendAnimation(StringName animation, float time, float delta, bool seeked, bool isExternalSeeking, float blend, int loopedFlag)
members.summary: Blends an animation by [param blend] amount (name must be valid in the linked [AnimationPlayer]). A [param time] and [param delta] may be passed, as well as whether [param seeked] happened. A [param looped_flag] is used by internal processing immediately after the loop.

members.name: BlendInput
members.signature: public float BlendInput(int inputIndex, float time, bool seek, bool isExternalSeeking, float blend, int filter, bool sync, bool testOnly)
members.summary: Blends an input. This is only useful for animation nodes created for an [AnimationNodeBlendTree]. The [param time] parameter is a relative delta, unless [param seek] is [code]true[/code], in which case it is absolute. A filter mode may be optionally passed.

members.name: BlendNode
members.signature: public float BlendNode(StringName name, AnimationNode node, float time, bool seek, bool isExternalSeeking, float blend, int filter, bool sync, bool testOnly)
members.summary: Blend another animation node (in case this animation node contains child animation nodes). This function is only useful if you inherit from [AnimationRootNode] instead, otherwise editors will not display your animation node for addition.

members.name: FindInput
members.summary: Returns the input index which corresponds to [param name]. If not found, returns [code]-1[/code].

members.name: GetInputCount
members.summary: Amount of inputs in this animation node, only useful for animation nodes that go into [AnimationNodeBlendTree].

members.name: GetInputName
members.summary: Gets the name of an input by index.

members.name: GetParameter
members.summary: Gets the value of a parameter. Parameters are custom local memory used for your animation nodes, given a resource can be reused in multiple trees.

members.name: GetProcessingAnimationTreeInstanceId
members.summary: Returns the object id of the [AnimationTree] that owns this node. [b]Note:[/b] This method should only be called from within the [method AnimationNodeExtension._process_animation_node] method, and will return an invalid id otherwise.

members.name: IsPathFiltered
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given path is filtered.

members.name: IsProcessTesting
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this animation node is being processed in test-only mode.

members.name: RemoveInput
members.summary: Removes an input, call this only when inactive.

members.name: SetFilterPath
members.signature: public void SetFilterPath(NodePath path, bool enable)
members.summary: Adds or removes a path for the filter.

members.name: SetInputName
members.signature: public bool SetInputName(int input, String name)
members.summary: Sets the name of the input at the given [param input] index. If the setting fails, returns [code]false[/code].

members.name: SetParameter
members.signature: public void SetParameter(StringName name, Variant value)
members.summary: Sets a custom parameter. These are used as local memory, because resources can be reused across the tree or scenes.

members.name: FilterEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], filtering is enabled.

signals.name: AnimationNodeRemoved
signals.summary: Emitted by nodes that inherit from this class and that have an internal tree when one of their animation nodes removes. The animation nodes that emit this signal are [AnimationNodeBlendSpace1D], [AnimationNodeBlendSpace2D], [AnimationNodeStateMachine], and [AnimationNodeBlendTree].

signals.name: AnimationNodeRenamed
signals.summary: Emitted by nodes that inherit from this class and that have an internal tree when one of their animation node names changes. The animation nodes that emit this signal are [AnimationNodeBlendSpace1D], [AnimationNodeBlendSpace2D], [AnimationNodeStateMachine], and [AnimationNodeBlendTree].

signals.name: NodeUpdated
signals.summary: Emitted by [AnimationNodeAnimation] when its [member AnimationNodeAnimation.animation] resource is changed, or by [AnimationNodeBlendTree] when its connections change.

signals.name: TreeChanged
signals.summary: Emitted by nodes that inherit from this class and that have an internal tree when one of their animation nodes changes. The animation nodes that emit this signal are [AnimationNodeBlendSpace1D], [AnimationNodeBlendSpace2D], [AnimationNodeStateMachine], [AnimationNodeBlendTree] and [AnimationNodeTransition].

values.name: FILTER_BLEND
values.summary: Paths matching the filter will be blended (by the blend value).

values.name: FILTER_PASS
values.summary: Paths matching the filter will be allowed to pass.

values.name: FILTER_STOP
values.summary: Paths matching the filter will be discarded.

constants.name: FILTER_PASS
constants.summary: Paths matching the filter will be allowed to pass.

constants.name: FILTER_STOP
constants.summary: Paths matching the filter will be discarded.

constants.name: FILTER_BLEND
constants.summary: Paths matching the filter will be blended (by the blend value).
